FR-01.title: Client Intake and Registration
requirements: Implement complete client intake and registration functionality
All client intake and registration operations must be validated and authorized
System shall maintain audit log for client intake and registration actions
Support search and filtering within client intake and registration
Enable notifications for important client intake and registration events
acceptance_criteria: User can successfully perform all client intake and registration operations
System validates all client intake and registration inputs correctly
Error messages display clearly for client intake and registration failures

FR-01.title: Build Client Intake and Registration API
FR-01.description: Create REST API endpoints for client intake and registration feature in Legal Practice Management System. Implement business logic, validation, database operations, and error handling. Add authentication and authorization checks.

FR-01.title: Build Client Intake and Registration UI
FR-01.description: Create user interface components for client intake and registration. Implement responsive design with form validation, loading states, error handling, and smooth transitions. Connect to API endpoints.

FR-01.title: Design Client Intake and Registration Database Schema
FR-01.description: Create database tables/collections for client intake and registration. Define fields, data types, constraints, indexes, and relationships. Add migration scripts.

FR-01.title: Write Client Intake and Registration Tests
FR-01.description: Write unit and integration tests for client intake and registration feature. Cover happy path, error cases, edge cases, and validation rules. Achieve minimum 80% coverage.
